nodes.name: 20260601033000_community_event_submission_down.sql
nodes.summary: Rollback script that reverts the community event submission feature, removing related tables and submission workflow functions.

nodes.name: 20260601034000_activate_baton_rouge_sources_down.sql
nodes.summary: Rollback script that deactivates Baton Rouge event sources by reverting the activation status set in the forward migration.

nodes.name: 20260601035000_community_event_status_notification_down.sql
nodes.summary: Rollback script that removes the notification triggers fired when a community-submitted event changes status.

nodes.name: 20260601036000_admin_user_delete_down.sql
nodes.summary: Rollback script that removes the admin user-delete RPC function and associated permission grants.

nodes.name: 20260610162002_enqueue_source_scrape_rpc_down.sql
nodes.summary: Rollback script that drops the enqueue_source_scrape RPC used to manually trigger source scraping jobs.

nodes.name: 20260610170000_admin_events_source_filter_down.sql
nodes.summary: Large rollback script reverting admin event source filtering capabilities, restoring previous versions of admin event list functions without source-filter parameters.

nodes.name: 20260610180000_admin_dashboard_stats_down.sql
nodes.summary: Rollback script that drops the admin dashboard statistics RPC function.
